options.name: --debug
options.description: Displays debug information. Default: false.

options.name: --log-file
options.description:
Path to the file where all logs will be
saved.

options.name: --log-file-log-level
options.description:
Log level for the log file (if the log file path is
specified). Supported levels: Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error,
Critical, None.

options.name: --log-level
options.description:
Log level for console output. Supported levels: Trace,
Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical, None.

options.name: --quiet
options.description:
Runs command silently, without displaying any output.
Default: false.

options.name: --requests-log-file
options.description:
Path to the file where structured JSON data about HTTP
requests will be saved.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Displays all available information, including debug
details. Default: false.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description:
Path at which .teapie folder should be created. If not 
specified, it attempts to find root of repository (the one containing '.git' 
folder).

commands.name: test

options.name: --debug
options.description: Displays debug information. Default: false.

options.name: --env-file
options.description:
Path to file, which contains definitions of available
environments. If not provided, the tool will use the first matching 'env.json'
file found in '.teapie' folder or the collection (respectively parent folder of
test case).

options.name: --env
options.description:
Name of the environment on which application will be
run.

options.name: --init-script
options.description:
Path to script, which will be used for initialization
before the first test-case execution. If not provided, the tool will use the
first matching 'init.csx' file found in '.teapie' folder or the collection
(respectively parent folder of test case).

options.name: --log-file
options.description:
Path to the file where all logs will be
saved.

options.name: --log-file-log-level
options.description:
Log level for the log file (if the log file path is
specified). Supported levels: Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error,
Critical, None.

options.name: --log-level
options.description:
Log level for console output. Supported levels: Trace,
Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical, None.

options.name: --no-cache-vars
options.description:
Disables loading variables from file and caching them to
file.

options.name: --quiet
options.description:
Runs command silently, without displaying any output.
Default: false.

options.name: --report-file
options.description:
Path to file, which will be used for test results summary
report generation. If this option is not used, no report to file is
generated.

options.name: --requests-log-file
options.description:
Path to the file where structured JSON data about HTTP
requests will be saved.

options.name: --temp-path
options.description:
Temporary path for the application. Defaults to the
system's temporary folder with a TeaPie sub-folder if no path is
provided.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Displays all available information, including debug
details. Default: false.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description:
Path to the collection or test case which will be tested. 
Defaults to the current directory.

commands.description:
Runs tests from the collection at the specified path. If no 
path is provided, the current directory is used.

commands.name: generate

options.name: --init
options.description:
Indicates whether to generate pre-request script (with
'-init' suffix).

options.name: --test
options.description:
Indicates whether to generate post-response script (with
'-test' suffix).

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Name of test case to be generated.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path at which test case will be created.

examples: generate myTestCase [path] gen myTestCase "path" g myTestCase "path" -i FALSE -t TRUE

commands.name: explore

options.name: --debug
options.description: Displays debug information. Default: false.

options.name: --env-file
options.description:
Path to file, which contains definitions of available
environments. If this option is not used, first found file within '.teapie'
folder or collection (respectively parent folder of test case) with name
'env.json' is used.

options.name: --init-script
options.description:
Path to script, which will be used for initialization
before the first test-case execution. If this option is not used, first found
file within '.teapie' folder or collection (respectively parent folder of test
case) with name 'init.csx' is used.

options.name: --log-file
options.description:
Path to the file where all logs will be
saved.

options.name: --log-file-log-level
options.description:
Log level for the log file (if the log file path is
specified). Supported levels: Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error,
Critical, None.

options.name: --log-level
options.description:
Log level for console output. Supported levels: Trace,
Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical, None.

options.name: --quiet
options.description:
Runs command silently, without displaying any output.
Default: false.

options.name: --requests-log-file
options.description:
Path to the file where structured JSON data about HTTP
requests will be saved.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Displays all available information, including debug
details. Default: false.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description:
Path to collection or test case which will be explored. 
Defaults to the current directory.

commands.description: Explores collection structure and displays it.

options.name: --glob
options.description:
Indicates whether to clear global cache (in system
temporary folder).
